summary: Iteration 65: Tested 3 new features - (1) Delete own posts with confirmation across the app, (2) Mobile navbar logo 48px tall, (3) Clickable album cards in Hive feed opening modal. All backend endpoints pass (10/10 tests). Frontend features verified via code review and UI testing.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for screen reader accessibility (minor a11y issue)

passed_tests: Backend: DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} returns 404 for non-existent post - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} returns 403 for non-owner - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} owner can delete own post - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} removes likes and comments - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/listings/{listing_id} returns 404 for non-existent - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/iso/{iso_id} returns 404 for non-existent - PASSED
Backend: Create and delete ISO works - PASSED
Frontend: Mobile navbar logo is 48px tall (h-[48px] class verified) - PASSED
Frontend: Mobile top bar and bottom nav present - PASSED
Frontend: Explore page album modal opens with variant details - PASSED
Frontend: Album modal shows year, label, catalog number, format, country, color variant - PASSED
Frontend: Album modal shows 'Add to Collection' and 'Add to Wantlist' for non-owner - PASSED
Frontend: 'View on Discogs' link present when discogs_id available - PASSED

delete_post_endpoint.behavior: Deletes post and associated likes/comments. Returns 403 for non-owner, 404 for non-existent.

delete_listing_endpoint.behavior: Existing endpoint, works correctly for owner's listings.

hive_page_delete_ui.components: PostCard has 3-dot menu (MoreVertical) for owner only, opens AlertDialog with delete confirmation
hive_page_delete_ui.dialog_text: Are you sure you want to delete this post? This cannot be undone.

isopage_delete_confirmation.components: Trash button on listings/ISOs triggers AlertDialog confirmation
isopage_delete_confirmation.dialog_text: Are you sure you want to delete this {ISO|listing}? This cannot be undone.

hive_album_modal.behavior: Clicking album card in Now Spinning/Haul posts opens modal with variant details
modal_content: Variant pills (year, label, catno, format, country, color_variant)
Contextual action buttons based on ownership

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 features implemented correctly per requirements
PostCards.js AlbumLink component properly accepts onAlbumClick callback for modal behavior
Delete confirmation dialogs follow consistent pattern across HivePage and ISOPage
Minor: DialogContent accessibility warnings should be addressed with VisuallyHidden title/description
seed_data_creation: Created test users testdelete65@test.com and testother65@test.com for delete permission testing. Test posts created and deleted during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 verified 3 new features: (1) DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} endpoint - requires auth, only owner can delete, also deletes likes/comments; (2) Mobile logo is 48px tall via h-[48px] class in Navbar.js; (3) Album cards in Hive feed posts are clickable and open a modal (same as Explore page) with variant details and contextual action buttons based on ownership. Test users: testdelete65@test.com / testpass123. All APIs are real (no mocking).
